chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-152 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.626/2024 3. For hearing of main case 08-05-2024 Mr. Zafar Ali Eidan Mangi, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate for SEPCO Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’ Deputy Attorney General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for SEPCO has filed statement stating that one deduction of Rs.10860/- has been removed and such entry has been made in the computer. The other deduction is in the process of being removed and necessary entry will also be made in the computer within two months. Leaned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. However, let necessary exercise be done within two months as undertaken by learned counsel for the SEPCO. JUDGE JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
